public class Solution { public int minMoves(int[] nums, int k) { List ones_pos = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] == 1) { ones_pos.add(i - ones_pos.size()); } } int sum = 0; for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) { sum += ones_pos.get(i); } int min_sum = sum; for (int i = k; i < ones_pos.size(); i++) { sum += ones_pos.get(i) - ones_pos.get(i - k); if (sum > min_sum) break; min_sum = Math.min(min_sum, sum); } return min_sum - (k - 1) * k / 2; } }

import java.util.HashMap; public class Solution { public boolean canEqualFrequency(String word) { HashMap freq = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : word.toCharArray()) { freq.put(c, freq.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); } HashMap count_freq = new HashMap<>(); for (int f : freq.values()) { count_freq.put(f, count_freq.getOrDefault(f, 0) + 1); } if (count_freq.size() != 2) { return false; } int a = (int) count_freq.keySet().toArray()[0]; int acount = count_freq.get(a); int b = (int) count_freq.keySet().toArray()[1]; int bcount = count_freq.get(b); return ((acount == 1 && (a - 1 == b || a == 1)) || (bcount == 1 && (b - 1 == a || b == 1))) && Math.abs(a - b) <= 1; } }
